title: Gauhati High Court denies anticipatory bail to Congress leader Pawan Khera in Assam Police FIR
description: The Gauhati High Court on Friday rejected Congress leader Pawan Khera's plea for anticipatory bail in the case recently registered against him by the Crime Branch of Assam Police in Guwahati.Justice Parthivjyoti Saikia had reserved the decision on Khera's bail plea on April 21. Today, the Court rejected the bail plea.ustice Parthivjyoti Saikia A criminal case alleging defamation, forgery and criminal conspiracy was recently registered against Khera.The case was registered following his recent cl
